chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-726 of 2021 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on o/objection 2.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2024 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Naich, Assistant A.G. ***** Learned AAG submits that petitioner has already joined his duty as Junior Clerk against ‘Deceased Quota’, hence this petition has served its purpose. Accordingly, this petition having served its purpose is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
